name: Hat of Many Spells
description: This pointed hat has special properties for spellcasting.

spellcasting_focus.description: While holding hat, can use it as Spellcasting Focus for Wizard spells
spellcasting_focus.somatic_component: Must reach into hat and pull spell out of it

unknown_spell.description: Can try to cast a level 1+ spell not known
requirements: Spell must be on Wizard spell list
Spell must be level you can cast
Spell can't have Material components costing more than 1,000 GP
process: Expend spell slot of spell's level
unknown_spell.success: Cast spell using normal casting time; can't use this property until finishing Short or Long Rest
unknown_spell.failure: Fail to cast and random effect occurs
unknown_spell.spell_casting_stats: Uses your spell save DC and spell attack bonus

failure_table.effect: Cast random spell (1d10): 1=Enlarge/Reduce (enlarge), 2=Enlarge/Reduce (reduce), 3=Faerie Fire, 4=Fireball, 5=Gust of Wind, 6=Invisibility (self), 7=Lightning Bolt, 8=Phantasmal Force, 9=Polymorph, 10=Stinking Cloud
Have Stunned condition until end of next turn, believing something awesome happened
Harmless swarm of butterflies fills 10-foot Cube within 30 feet; disperses after 1 minute
Pull nonmagical object (1d4): 1=vial of Acid, 2=flask of Alchemist's Fire, 3=Crowbar, 4=lit Torch
Suffer magic sickness with Poisoned condition for 1 hour
Have Petrified condition until end of next turn
Pull nonmagical object (1d4): 1=Dagger, 2=Rope with Grappling Hook, 3=bag of Caltrops, 4=gem worth 50 GP
Creature appears in unoccupied space (uncontrolled, acts normally, disappears after 1 hour or at 0 HP). Roll 1d4: 1=Camel, 2=Constrictor Snake, 3=Elephant, 4=Mule
Hostile Swarm of Bats flies out, occupies space, attacks you
10-foot-diameter two-way portal to another plane opens within 30 feet, remains open until end of next turn
Pull magic item (1d6 rarity): 1–3=Common, 4–5=Uncommon, 6=Rare. Item disappears after 1 hour if not consumed/destroyed
